user_feedback:
Uncaught ReferenceError: checkAABB is not defined
    at Enemy.update (entities.js:224:13)
    at game.js:114:42
    at Array.forEach (<anonymous>)
    at updateGameLogic (game.js:114:27)
    at p.draw (game.js:70:17)
    at e.default.redraw (p5.min.js:2:542441)
    at _draw (p5.min.js:2:462354)
analysis:
- Issue identified: The `entities.js` file is missing the import statement for `checkAABB` function from `physics.js`. The Enemy.update method at line 224 calls `checkAABB(this, gameState.player)` but the function is never imported, causing a ReferenceError.
- Files affected: entities.js
- Changes needed: Add the missing import statement `import { resolveMapCollision, checkAABB } from './physics.js';` to the imports section at the top of entities.js. The function `resolveMapCollision` is also used in the file and needs to be imported from the same module.
